name: HTS_SCHED_SHIFT_ATRBS
description: Table to store schedule shift attributes

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_ATRB_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: SCHED_REQUEST_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the request as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule event as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule shift event as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_ATRB_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule shift attribute as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
columns.Comments: Value of the attribute. Stored as a string to cover all alphanumeric values

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
